_notes.pinch_threshold: Lower = tighter pinch required. 0.25-0.40 is typical.
_notes.pinch_hold_ms: Hold duration before grab fires. Increase to prevent misfires.
_notes.swipe_velocity: Wrist x-velocity (normalized) to trigger desktop switch.
_notes.drag_scale: Multiplier mapping hand motion to pixel movement. Increase for faster drag.
_notes.show_debug_window: Set false to hide the OpenCV preview window.
